description: Buddhism flourished in China under the Tang dynasty (618–907). This monumental Buddha exhibits the deity's distinctive features: tightly curled hair covering a cranial mound that symbolizes his enlightenment and a forehead depression that originally held a jewel representing wisdom. The pedestal base is ringed with lotus petals, white flowers that rise from muddy water and evoke Buddhist beliefs in purity and the search for enlightenment.
title: Buddha
